history.content:
<thought>
The goal is located at row 05, column E. My current orientation faces right, and the cell directly in front of me contains lava, so I cannot move forward. To proceed towards the goal, I need to turn left to face upwards.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is still at row 05, column E. Currently, I am facing up, and the cell in front of me is clear. Moving forward will take me closer to the goal. There are no obstacles or lava in my path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
